case_title: ALFONSO GREGORIO ITUM VS. KATE STOIA, AN INDIVIDUAL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ITUM, ALFONSO GREGORIO AS TO DEFENDANT KATE STOIA, AN INDIVIDUAL MAOZ, RONEN "RONY", AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ITUM, ALFONSO GREGORIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KATE STOIA, AN INDIVIDUAL MAOZ, RONEN "RONY", AN INDIVIDUAL $7,580.68 PRINCIPAL, $4.79 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,810.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
